attachments.fallback: How to Easily Convert Outlook PST to MBOX? - @haileleonsmith
attachments.text: Convert MBOX to PST for free using built-in tools and limited free utilities. The most reliable no-cost method is Thunderbird + Outlook via IMAP: add your MBOX into Thunderbird, connect the same IMAP account in both Thunderbird and Outlook, copy mails from MBOX folders to the IMAP account in Thunderbird, then let Outlook sync and export to PST via File > Open & Export > Export to a file > Outlook …
attachments.title: How to Easily Convert Outlook PST to MBOX? [How-to Discussions]
